ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sector was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sector was last updated */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the sector data */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the sector data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the industry belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the industry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the industry was last updated */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the industry data */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the industry data */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Average annual growth rate of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industries_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets_products" (
  "asset_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset or product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the asset or product */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry the asset or product belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset or product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the asset or product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the asset or product was last updated */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the asset or product data */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the asset or product data */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the asset or product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_products_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "asset_product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset or product the metric belongs to */,
  "basis" TEXT /* Basis of the metric (e.g., NET) */,
  "1997Q1" REAL /* Performance metric for 1997Q1 */,
  "1997Q2" REAL /* Performance metric for 1997Q2 */,
  "1997Q3" REAL /* Performance metric for 1997Q3 */,
  "1997Q4" REAL /* Performance metric for 1997Q4 */,
  "1998Q1" REAL /* Performance metric for 1998Q1 */,
  "1998Q2" REAL /* Performance metric for 1998Q2 */,
  "1998Q3" REAL /* Performance metric for 1998Q3 */,
  "1998Q4" REAL /* Performance metric for 1998Q4 */,
  "1999Q1" REAL /* Performance metric for 1999Q1 */,
  "1999Q2" REAL /* Performance metric for 1999Q2 */,
  "1999Q3" REAL /* Performance metric for 1999Q3 */,
  "1999Q4" REAL /* Performance metric for 1999Q4 */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the metric data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the performance metric data */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the performance metric data */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_asset_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_product_id") REFERENCES assets_products ("asset_product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metric */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was logged */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
